author: 0xunclebill
content:
we have a bug where if a peer for a given epoch range serves us zero envelopes we ban the peer who serves us the next epoch if they try to build on a full payload. 

also sidenote it seems buildoor-prysm doesnt serve envelopes at all?

author: terencechain
content: re: prysm syncing  slow, we probably should have reduced wait for bandwidth by 5 or 10. I typically did this for old devnets and it worked great. not sure if we did this for devnet5

author: pk910
content:
It's very likely related to the custom prysm image with hacked in POST `/beacon/execution_payload_envelope` endpoint to submit the envelopes. It's basically the cl clients job to propagate it from there.
Let me do another compatibility check to see if any cl client has implemented the full gloas beacon api changes, so we can use a regular cl client for the buildoor node

author: 0xunclebill

we are able to run buildoor in kurtosis. i can prepare an image with those changes ontop of glamsterdam-devnet-5 if thats helpful
